calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2008 Continued To Jan-30-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Michael Walker, Esq. for Plaintiff: Grubb & Nadler, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness Saul Nadler was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Perez Nursery, Inc. and Irma Perez as follows:
Principal $23,105.25
Attorney Fee $1,891.91
Interest $1,694.97
Costs $335.00 for a total of $27,027.13
Judgment signed in open court.
